title: config_emission
description: Output contract for config.py generation. The model emits JSON conforming to this schema; the deterministic writer at .claude/melleafy/writers/config_writer.py renders the Python source.

constants.description: Ordered list of module-level Final constants to emit in config.py.

name.description: SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE identifier. Must be a valid Python identifier.

value.description: The constant's value as a JSON scalar. Strings may contain any characters including quotes, backslashes, and braces — the writer uses repr() or triple-quoting to produce safe Python source.

type.description: Python type annotation. Must match the JSON type of value: string→str, integer→int, number→float, boolean→bool.

category.description: Optional C-category code from the dependency plan (e.g. 'C1', 'C8'). Used by the writer to group constants under labelled section headers. Omit for runtime constants (LOOP_BUDGET etc.) that are not derived from a classified source element.

provenance.description: Optional. Source location of the element this constant was derived from. Written as '# PROVENANCE: <source_file>:<source_lines>' immediately after the constant declaration.

source_file.description: Relative path to the source file (e.g. 'SOUL.md', 'agents.yaml').
